meta.title: Tabidea Blog Guide
meta.description: Learn how to publish travel articles on Tabidea and embed your travel notes.

guide.title: Turn travel insights into stories.
guide.description: With Tabidea Blog, you can publish travel stories, context behind your itinerary, and local tips. You can also embed your published travel notes so readers can check the actual route.
guide.featuresList2: Generate public URLs with your profile (@username)
guide.featuresList3: Create practical travel articles with embedded travel notes
guide.gettingStartedList2: Create a new post in Blog Studio
guide.gettingStartedList3: Embed a travel note URL if needed, then publish
